---
title: "Simulation sanity check"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Simulation sanity check}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE
)
```

# Purpose

This vignette will demonstrate a short (<60 s) synthetic-DGP sanity
check showing that `scfit()` recovers known structural parameters on a
small simulated conjoint experiment. The demo is intended as a
does-it-work smoke test, not as a finite-sample simulation study.

Full Monte Carlo studies live in the private prototype materials and
are not part of the package scope.

# Status

Milestone M1 (package skeleton): this vignette is a placeholder. The
simulation sanity check will be implemented alongside the DNN backend
in a later milestone.
